title: Assignment to unpacked array causes "Assignment pattern missed initializing elements" error message

features.name: unpacked array with multi-dimensional packed element type
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration where the element type is a multi-dimensional packed array (e.g., logic [31:0] array [3:0])

features.name: slice assignment to unpacked array with assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include an assign statement that assigns a slice of an unpacked array using assignment pattern syntax (e.g., array[3:1] = '{val1, val2, val3})
